headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on DTE Energy, Raises Price Target to $156
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $151 to $156.
